about.title: About VivatBet
about.subtitle: Your trusted source for live sports scores, fixtures and results across 500+ leagues worldwide.
about.missionText: VivatBet delivers real-time sports data to help fans stay informed. We aggregate live scores, match statistics and tournament information from trusted sources across the globe.
about.feature1Text: Real-time scores across football, basketball, tennis, hockey and 30+ sports updated every few seconds.
about.feature2Text: Detailed head-to-head stats, form guides, and historical data to give you the full picture.
about.feature3Text: Full fixture calendar with upcoming matches, kick-off times and tournament context across every league we cover.
about.feature4Text: From Champions League to local divisions — we cover competitions worldwide.
about.poweredByText: VivatBet is built on the Vivat Sport data platform, providing reliable and accurate sports information for the Belgian and European market.
about.termsIntro: By using VivatBet Sport (fastscore.vercel.app) you agree to our Terms & Conditions. The site provides sports information for purely informational purposes — it does not facilitate betting or gambling. All betting activity takes place exclusively on the main Vivat Sport platform.
about.termsHighlight1Text: Information for sports fans only. Users must be 18+. Data comes from third-party sources — verify with official sources before decisions.
about.termsHighlight2Text: All content is the exclusive property of VivatBet Sport or its partners, protected by Belgian and international copyright law.
about.termsHighlight3Text: We are committed to responsible gaming. If you experience gambling-related difficulties, contact the Belgian support services or bedenkjekansen.be.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for VivatBetSport
privacy.intro: VivatBet Sport ("we", "our", "us") attaches the highest importance to the protection of your personal data. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store and protect your information when you visit fastscore.vercel.app, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Belgian law of 30 July 2018. Data controller: VivatBet Sport, Brussels, Belgium — info@vivatbetsport.be.
privacy.section1Text: Data collected automatically: IP address (anonymised for statistics), browser type, operating system, language, pages visited, session duration, referral source, device type and screen resolution. Data you provide via the contact form: your name, email address, subject and message content. We do not collect any banking data or sensitive data (health, political opinions, religion, etc.) on this site.
privacy.section2Text: We use your data only to: respond to your requests submitted via the contact form; analyse site traffic in an aggregated, anonymous way; detect and prevent technical abuse (DDoS, scraping, fraud); continuously improve our service; and comply with our legal obligations. We do not sell or rent your data to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.section3Text: Our processing is based on your explicit consent (contact form, non-essential cookies), our legitimate interest (site security, anonymous traffic analysis), the execution of a contract (responding to your requests) and our legal obligations. Retention: contact form data — 24 months max after last exchange; technical logs — 12 months; anonymised analytics — 26 months.
privacy.section4Text: We may share your data with our technical providers (Vercel hosting, analytics) under confidentiality agreements, and with competent authorities upon legal request. No data is transferred outside the European Economic Area without appropriate safeguards (EU Commission standard contractual clauses).
privacy.section5Text: You have at any time the right to: access your data, rectify errors, erase data ("right to be forgotten"), restrict processing, data portability, object to processing, withdraw your consent, and lodge a complaint with the Belgian Data Protection Authority (autoriteprotectiondonnees.be). To exercise these rights, write to info@vivatbetsport.be with proof of identity. We respond within 30 days.
privacy.section6Text: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss, alteration or disclosure: HTTPS encryption, restricted access, regular security updates. However, no transmission over the Internet is entirely secure — we cannot guarantee absolute security. Questions: info@vivatbetsport.be.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to VivatBet Sport. By accessing and using this site (fastscore.vercel.app) you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not accept any part of them, please do not use the site.
terms.aboutCompanyText: VivatBet Sport is a Belgian operator of sports information and online betting, dedicated to offering sports enthusiasts a high-quality, transparent and responsible experience. The platform aggregates real-time scores, fixtures, results and statistics across more than 500 competitions worldwide — from the Jupiler Pro League and the Champions League to leading basketball, tennis, hockey and 30+ other disciplines. Our mission: provide reliable, second-by-second sports data to fans in Belgium and Europe, in their own language (FR / NL / EN / DE), in a clear and secure environment compliant with Belgian and European law. VivatBet Sport operates in strict respect of the Belgian regulatory framework for sports operators — GDPR, responsible gaming, transparent advertising. The fastscore.vercel.app site is the information hub of VivatBet Sport, dedicated exclusively to scores and statistics — it does not facilitate betting or gambling. Contact: info@vivatbetsport.be — Brussels, Belgium.
terms.section1Text: The site provides sports information for purely informational purposes: live scores, fixtures, results, match statistics, news. The site does not offer betting, gambling or financial transactions of any kind. All betting activity takes place exclusively on the main Vivat Sport platform, governed by its own terms and licences.
terms.section2Text: Access to the site is free and open. Users must be at least 18 years old to use the associated services linked to sports betting. The user agrees to use the site in accordance with applicable laws and these terms.
terms.section3Text: We make every effort to ensure the accuracy and freshness of the data, but scores, statistics and results come from third-party sources and may contain errors, delays or omissions. The Operator cannot be held liable for decisions made on the basis of the displayed information. All content on the site (text, graphics, logos, code, database, trademarks) is the exclusive property of VivatBet Sport or its partners, protected by Belgian and international copyright law.
terms.section4Text: The user agrees to: not attempt unauthorised access to the site or its systems; not use bots, scrapers or automated tools to extract data; not disrupt the operation of the site (DDoS, injection, etc.); not impersonate any third party. Any violation may result in immediate blocking and legal action.
terms.section5Text: To the extent permitted by Belgian law, VivatBet Sport shall not be liable for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of or inability to use the site, loss of data, profit or commercial opportunity, temporary service interruption, maintenance, bugs or technical incidents. VivatBet Sport is committed to responsible gaming. If you or a loved one experience gambling-related difficulties, contact the Belgian support services (Jeu Hasard Info / bedenkjekansen.be).
terms.section6Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. The applicable version is the one published on this page. Continued use of the site after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms. These Terms are governed by Belgian law. Any dispute falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Brussels. Contact: info@vivatbetsport.be.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy for VivatBetSport
cookiePolicy.intro: This policy explains how VivatBet Sport uses cookies and similar technologies on fastscore.vercel.app, in compliance with the GDPR and the ePrivacy directive applicable in Belgium.
cookiePolicy.section1Text: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember your actions and preferences (language, theme, login) for a defined period, so you do not have to re-enter them on each visit.
cookiePolicy.section2Text: We use cookies to: remember your language choice (FR / NL / EN / DE); remember your theme (dark / light); analyse site traffic anonymously and improve the user experience; ensure the security of your session. We do not use cookies for behavioural advertising or cross-site tracking. Third-party services we may use (e.g. Google Analytics) place their own cookies — please consult their privacy policies. Session cookies are removed when you close the browser; persistent cookies last up to 12 months.
cookiePolicy.essentialText: Required for the site to function properly (language, theme, security). They cannot be disabled without making the site unusable.
cookiePolicy.functionalText: Enhance your experience by remembering interface preferences (font size, favourite sport, layout).
cookiePolicy.analyticsText: Collect aggregated, anonymised data on site usage (pages visited, session duration, user journey) so we can improve our service.
cookiePolicy.section4Text: You can at any time accept or refuse cookies via the banner that appears on your first visit, change preferences via your browser settings, or delete cookies already stored on your device. Disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the site. The placement of non-essential cookies requires your prior consent, in accordance with article 129 of the Belgian law of 13 June 2005 on electronic communications and article 7 of the GDPR. Questions: info@vivatbetsport.be.
